description: shadcn-ui sidebar tooltip fix - .tsx components (ui) + .json style configs (config)
rationale: sidebar.tsx under ui/ = ui (6 lines, above threshold). sidebar.json files under public/r/styles/ = config (10 lines, .json extension). 2 domains (ui + config) = WARNING.
notes: Reveals a classification gap: .json style/registry files are classified as config, but they're actually UI-related (component style definitions). This is a known limitation of extension-based classification.
